query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A person holding a light-colored umbrella appears against a field divided horizontally into vivid yellow above and warm orange below. The figure is positioned left of center, walking from left to right. The color gradient transitions sharply between the two dominant hues.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred silhouette of a person with a light-colored umbrella dissolves against a field of clashing yellow and orange. The figure lacks any discernible facial features, clothing texture, or bodily detail, reduced to a smeared dark mass with trailing streaks. The aggressive blur and absence of fine information render the subject nearly abstract, prioritizing color fields and gestural movement over recognizable form.
